title: Fix cmake not using ccache
body:
Running

```
rm -rf test_regress/obj_vlt ; test_regress/t/t_trace_saif_cmake.py  --vlt --verbose
rm -rf test_regress/obj_vlt ; test_regress/t/t_trace_saif_cmake.py  --vlt --verbose
```

The second run does not hit in the ccache.  We can see it isn't running ccache at all:

```
  5%] Building CXX object CMakeFiles/Vt_trace_saif_cmake.dir/Vt_trace_saif_cmake__main.cpp.o
/usr/bin/c++ -DTEST_OBJ_DIR=/verilator/test_regress/obj_vlt/t_trace_saif_cmake ...
```

Can someone with cmake understanding please debug, e.g. @andrewvoznytsa as you were in there last?

Bonus points for adding a test to check it keeps working.
code_blocks:
rm -rf test_regress/obj_vlt ; test_regress/t/t_trace_saif_cmake.py  --vlt --verbose
rm -rf test_regress/obj_vlt ; test_regress/t/t_trace_saif_cmake.py  --vlt --verbose
  5%] Building CXX object CMakeFiles/Vt_trace_saif_cmake.dir/Vt_trace_saif_cmake__main.cpp.o
/usr/bin/c++ -DTEST_OBJ_DIR=/verilator/test_regress/obj_vlt/t_trace_saif_cmake ...
